Product Description: Vitacup Collagen Beauty Coffee Pods Collagen Beauty Coffee Pods bring together the smooth, rich taste of premium Arabica coffee with essential beauty-supporting ingredients. Crafted as a medium-dark roast, this blend has a mellow body with warm cinnamon notes and a crisp, refreshing finish. Each pod is infused with collagen, biotin, folate, and powerful antioxidants, offering a nourishing addition to your daily coffee routine. Designed for convenience, these single-serve pods are compatible with Keurig brewers, making it easy to enjoy a beauty-boosting cup of coffee anytime. Infused with bovine collagen, this coffee is formulated to support hair, skin, and nail health. Biotin (B7) and methylfolate (B9) provide essential B vitamins, while cinnamon, a natural source of antioxidants, helps protect against free radicals. The combination of premium Arabica coffee and carefully selected ingredients creates a balanced, flavorful cup that fits effortlessly into a beauty-conscious lifestyle. Why You’ll Love It: Crafted with 100% premium Arabica coffee beans for a smooth, satisfying taste Infused with collagen, biotin, and folate to complement your beauty routine Natural cinnamon for a subtle spice and added antioxidant support Brewing your perfect cup is simple. Vitacup Collagen Beauty Coffee Pods are compatible with Keurig brewers, allowing you to enjoy a fresh, nutrient-infused cup in just minutes. Just pop in a pod, brew as usual, and enjoy a delicious coffee blend designed to complement your daily wellness goals.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Count

The brand emphasizes convenience, quality, and wellness benefits, targeting health-conscious adults seeking a nutrient-infused daily coffee routine.
